assertion.value: Q.L., P.L.M. and I.C. are inventors on a patent application (PCT/US2021/021419) submitted by Cornell University that covers electrically programmable microscale shape-memory actuators and related robotic devices. W.W., Q.L., M.F.R., P.L.M. and I.C. are inventors on a provisional patent application (63/267,190) submitted by Cornell University that covers actuators and control electronics for cilium metasurfaces and a provisional patent application (63/368,751) submitted by Cornell University that covers integrated circuits for controlling microscopic robots. The other authors declare no competing interests.
